name: HYTE X50 ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Strawberry Milk - 4mm Thick Laminated Acoustic Glass - Full-Coverage Micro-Mesh Panels - 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - 2x USB 3.2 Gen 1x1 Type-A - 3.5mm Audio Combo Jack - Magnetic Dust Filters (CS-HYTE-X50G-SM)

description: Mid-tower ATX case with 4mm laminated acoustic glass, micro-mesh panels, and USB 3.2 connectivity in vibrant Strawberry Milk color.
